calendar.matters:
Petition For A Hearing For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Nov-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jana Buresova; 408-505-4942; Launchlaw IO, Inc; counsel for plaintiff.
Nikrooz Niknahad; defendant appearing in pro per.

Hearing held. Defendant reports to the court that he has filed cross complaint. The court informs him that document filed 11/4/24 is not a cross complaint. Discussed. The court rules as follows:

PETITIONER LANCE AREND COTTON LIVING TRUST Petition For A Hearing For Release Of Property From Lien is GRANTED.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
